osx.command: find . \( -name __pycache__ -o -name .pytest_cache -o -name .ruff_cache -o -name .mypy_cache -o -name .cache -o -name cache -o -name build -o -name dist -o -name '*.egg-info' \) -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} +; find . \( -name '*.pyc' -o -name '*.pyo' -o -name .coverage \) -type f -delete

linux.command: find . \( -name __pycache__ -o -name .pytest_cache -o -name .ruff_cache -o -name .mypy_cache -o -name .cache -o -name cache -o -name build -o -name dist -o -name '*.egg-info' \) -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} +; find . \( -name '*.pyc' -o -name '*.pyo' -o -name .coverage \) -type f -delete

inputs.description: Input interface name substring or index
